title: Peppery Fluffy Elote Quesadilla
description: A post-workout mexican dish featuring passion fruit pulp, yakimono-grilled elotes and a pescatarian-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped

instructions: Combine elotes with passion fruit pulp and jalapeño in a bowl.
Season the mixture with lime juice to taste.
Heat elote mixture evenly in the yakimono grill until fragrant and slightly browned on all sides.
Divide into individual quesadilla shells, sprinkle with queso fresco.
Cook quesadillas on each side for about 1-2 minutes per side, or until golden and puffed up.
Serve hot and enjoy your peppery fluffy elote quesadilla.
